title: Lack of Weight Updates
concept: Because the model weights are frozen, the learning is temporary; the model has no long-term memory of the task once the session ends.

exercises.prompt: What is the result of using a model with frozen weights?
exercises.explain: When weights are frozen, the AI cannot change its permanent settings, meaning it cannot store long-term memories.

cards.title: Why Do AIs Forget?
cards.body: Have you ever wondered why an AI helper seems to learn what you want during a chat, but completely forgets everything the next day? Let's unlock the mystery of frozen weights and temporary memory!

cards.title: Frozen Weights, Temporary Memory
cards.body: When we keep a model's weights frozen, the model cannot update its core brain. While it might look like it is learning and adapting during a chat session, this learning is only temporary. Once the session ends, all memory of that task is completely gone.

cards.title: The Guest Computer
cards.body: Think of a hotel guest using a guest computer. They can change the settings and write documents during their stay, but once they log out, the computer resets to its original state. The computer's hard drive was 'frozen' against permanent changes, leaving no trace of what the guest did.

cards.title: The Forgetful Translator
cards.body: Imagine you teach a frozen-weight translation bot some slang words during your chat. It uses them perfectly! But when you close the tab and open a new session, the bot forgets those slang words completely because its weights were never updated to store them permanently.

cards.title: Myth: Chatting Updates the Model
cards.body: Some people think that if an AI successfully performs a task in a chat, it has permanently learned it. In reality, unless the model's weights are actively updated and saved, the AI's internal 'hard drive' remains untouched and it will start fresh next time.

cards.title: Memory: Frozen vs. Updated
cards.body: Compare how memory works depending on whether the weights are frozen or allowed to update.

left.text: Temporary memory inside the prompt. Everything is forgotten when the session resets.

right.text: Permanent learning written into the model. The AI remembers the task forever.

exercises.prompt: What happens to a model's learning when its weights are frozen?

options.text: It has no long-term memory of the task once the session ends.
It gets smarter with every single question you ask.
It automatically saves your data to its core brain.
It deletes its own operating system.

exercises.explain: Frozen weights prevent the AI from making permanent changes to its parameters, meaning it cannot form long-term memories of the tasks you show it.

exercises.prompt: True or False: A model with frozen weights cannot retain long-term memory of your tasks after you close the session.
exercises.explain: Frozen weights mean the model cannot save new information permanently, so all learning is lost when the session ends.

exercises.prompt: Fill in the missing word to complete the rule about AI memory.
exercises.sentence: Because the model weights are [blank], the learning is temporary and cannot be remembered in the next session.
exercises.explain: When weights are frozen, no permanent updates can be written to the model's core memory, making all learning temporary.

exercises.prompt: Which of these scenarios describes an AI with frozen weights?

options.text: An AI system that updates its database every time you tell it your name.
A frozen-weight chatbot that forgets your custom writing style as soon as you refresh the page.
A music recommendation algorithm that permanently updates its weights based on your likes.

exercises.explain: Only the second option correctly shows an AI acting without permanent memory, while the others describe systems that save data permanently.

exercises.prompt: What is the main consequence of keeping a model's weights completely frozen during a task?

options.text: It permanently overwrites the model's original training data.
The model will not remember the task or keep the learning once the session ends.
The model will run out of hard drive space instantly.
The model will stop responding to all future users.

exercises.explain: Without updating the underlying weights, any learning or adjustment is temporary. The model cannot permanently store new patterns or remember your task once the current session or prompt window is closed.
